member.name: T:AssessedCustomFee
member.summary: A custom transfer fee that was assessed during the handling of a CryptoTransfer.

member.name: M:AssessedCustomFee.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert a byte array into an assessed custom fee object.
member.returns: the converted assessed custom fee object
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:AssessedCustomFee.FromProtobuf(Proto.AssessedCustomFee)
member.summary: Convert the protobuf object to an assessed custom fee object.
member.returns: the converted assessed custom fee object

member.name: P:AssessedCustomFee.Amount
member.summary: The number of units assessed for the fee

member.name: P:AssessedCustomFee.TokenId
member.summary: The denomination of the fee; taken as hbar if left unset

member.name: P:AssessedCustomFee.FeeCollectorAccountId
member.summary: The account to receive the assessed fee

member.name: P:AssessedCustomFee.PayerAccountIdList
member.summary: The account(s) whose final balances would have been higher in the absence of this assessed fee
